description: A designed dark-navy graphic titled 'ENFORCEMENT UPDATE' with the date 'January 27, 2025', topped by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal and name. It presents two large white figures: '1,179 Arrests' and '853 Detainers Lodged'. A footnote at the bottom reads 'ICE daily statistics as of midnight.' There is no photograph; it is a text-and-seal data card.
notable_text: ENFORCEMENT UPDATE January 27, 2025; 1,179 Arrests; 853 Detainers Lodged; ICE daily statistics as of midnight.
